mapper.select: SELECT CUSTOMER_ID FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP CUS WHERE NVL(CUS.SELF_CSTMR_CI, CUS.IPIN_CI) = #{connInfo} AND UPPER(REPLACE(CUS.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME, ' ', '')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{cstmrName}, ' ', '')) AND CUS.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'I' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE SUB_STATUS != 'C' AND PPPO = 'PO' AND CUSTOMER_ID = CUS.CUSTOMER_ID) AND FN_GET_AGE_JAVA@DL_MSP(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(CUS.CUSTOMER_SSN)) >= 19

SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM ,SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO ,SUB.SUB_STATUS ,SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO ,SUB.CUSTOMER_ID ,NVL(SUB.USIM_TYPE, 'U') AS USIM_TYPE ,NVL(DTL.SEQ, 0) AS SEQ ,NVL(DTL.SUB_SEQ, 0) AS SUB_SEQ ,DTL.PRE_CHK_RSLT_CD ,DTL.APPLY_RSLT_CD FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP SUB ,NMCP_FREE_USIM_REQ_DTL DTL WHERE SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = DTL.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND SUB.CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} AND SUB.SUB_STATUS != 'C' AND SUB.PPPO = 'PO' ORDER BY SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE

SELECT B.CUSTOMER_ID ,A.SVC_CNTR_NO ,A.OPEN_AGNT_CD ,A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CNTR_MOBILE_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP A ,MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP B WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND A.SUBSCRIBER_NO = TRIM(#{cstmrTel}) AND UPPER(REPLACE(A.SUB_LINK_NAME, ' ', '')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{cstmrName}, ' ', '')) AND A.SUB_STATUS != 'C' AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND B.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'I'

SELECT SEQ ,OSST_NO ,SUB_SEQ ,CONTRACT_NUM ,CUSTOMER_ID ,SVC_CNTR_NO ,SUBSCRIBER_NO ,SUB_STATUS ,REQ_IN_DAY ,CHNL_CD ,DELIVERY_TYPE FROM ( SELECT A.SEQ ,NVL(A.OSST_NO, 0) AS OSST_NO ,B.SUB_SEQ ,B.CONTRACT_NUM ,C.CUSTOMER_ID ,C.SVC_CNTR_NO ,C.SUBSCRIBER_NO ,C.SUB_STATUS ,TO_CHAR(A.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQ_IN_DAY ,D.EXPNSN_STR_VAL2 AS CHNL_CD ,D.EXPNSN_STR_VAL3 AS DELIVERY_TYPE FROM NMCP_FREE_USIM_REQ_MST A ,NMCP_FREE_USIM_REQ_DTL B ,MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP C ,NMCP_CD_DTL D WHERE A.SEQ = B.SEQ AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CHNL_CD = D.DTL_CD AND D.CD_GROUP_ID = 'UsimReqChnlCd' AND A.REQ_IN_DAY BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE - #{offsetDays}) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE + 1) AND B.PRE_CHK_RSLT_CD = '00' AND B.APPLY_RSLT_CD IS NULL ORDER BY A.REQ_IN_DAY, A.SEQ, B.SUB_SEQ ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{procCnt}
SELECT NFC_USIM_YN ,PRDT_CODE AS USIM_MODEL_CD ,PRDT_ID AS USIM_MODEL_ID FROM CMN_INTM_MDL@DL_MSP CIM WHERE CIM.PRDT_ID = #{intmMdlId}
